case_title: SCARPULLA, LEE R. VS CHOI, EUGENE Y.C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SCARPULLA, LEE R. AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, EUGENE Y.C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
